name: Salsa Verde
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Italian or curly parsley, finely chopped
1/4 cup Red wine vinegar, champagne-vinegar or lemon juice, to taste
recipeInstructions:
From "The Savory Way" by Deborah Madison. Bantam.
1. In a bowl, combine parsley, garlic, capers, and olive oil.
2. Stir in vinegar or lemon juice to taste.
3. Season with salt.
Serve sauce with pasta, white beans, tomatoes, or hard-cooked eggs. Makes approximately 1 cup. Serves 4.
NOTES:
For variety, include a small portion of other herbs (chervil, basil, dill, fennel greens, thyme, arugula, etc.) with the parsley. If using lemon juice for the acid, add some of the zest to the sauce.
